subject: WM-0184 ready for review
body: Exposed allocation-free HaulingClaimFactsIndex.readMappingInto with exact four-key reset/stale semantics, public types, receiver-exact three-declaration closure, and unchanged snapshot/hash/schema. Focused 171/171 and Keystone-approved single-worker quality 1096/1096 passed; default-parallel resource contention remains documented diagnostic evidence.
